ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_scores" INTEGER /* Total score achieved in the game session */,
  "best_tiles" INTEGER /* Number of best tiles achieved in the game session */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score achieved in any single game */,
  "max_tile" INTEGER /* Maximum tile value achieved in any single game */,
  "avg_score" REAL /* Average score achieved across all games in the session */,
  "ai_type" TEXT /* Type of AI strategy used (e.g., rollout, epsilon-greedy) */,
  "num_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the session */,
  "max_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth of the game tree explored by the AI */,
  "num_rollouts" INTEGER /* Number of rollout simulations performed by the AI */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Epsilon value used in epsilon-greedy strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., safest, aggressive) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the game session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the game session ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in seconds */,
  "ai_version" TEXT /* Version of the AI system used */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the game session was run */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_ai_type FOREIGN KEY ("ai_type") REFERENCES ai_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_strategy_type FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_type") REFERENCES game_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the AI strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AI strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the strategy is currently active */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., score, tile, time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI parameter */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI strategy the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the AI parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the AI parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ai_parameters_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES ai_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tiles" (
  "tile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tile */,
  "tile_value" INTEGER /* Value of the tile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tile was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tile is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session the score belongs to */,
  "score_value" INTEGER /* Value of the score achieved in the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was recorded */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rollout_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rollout simulation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session the simulation belongs to */,
  "num_simulations" INTEGER /* Number of simulations performed */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score achieved in the simulations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was completed */,
  "simulation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rollout_simulations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epsilon_values" (
  "epsilon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epsilon value */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI strategy the epsilon value belongs to */,
  "epsilon_value" REAL /* Value of the epsilon used in the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the epsilon value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the epsilon value was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the epsilon value is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epsilon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epsilon_values_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES ai_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, game developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is currently active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the session */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the session was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the session */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
